# Manager — Prompts

Prompt collection for **Manager**.

| Title | App | Use Case | Difficulty |
| ----- | --- | -------- | ---------- |
| [Change Communication Drafter](../../_canonical/change-communication-drafter.md) | Cross-App | Draft a clear, empathetic internal communication for an organisational or process change — balancing transparency with clarity and proactively addressing team concerns. | advanced |
| [Convert Email to Slide Outline](../../_canonical/convert-email-to-slide-outline.md) | Outlook | Transform email content into presentation-ready slide outlines | intermediate |
| [Convert Email to SOP Draft](../../_canonical/convert-email-to-sop-draft.md) | Outlook | Transform email discussions into structured standard operating procedures | advanced |
| [Cost/Resource Request Extractor](../../_canonical/cost-resource-request-extractor.md) | Outlook | Extract and organize budget and resource requests from emails | intermediate |
| [Cross-Functional Alignment Brief](../../_canonical/cross-functional-alignment-brief.md) | Cross-App | Detect misalignment or coordination gaps between your team and peer teams before they become blockers — so you can align proactively rather than reactively. | advanced |
| [Cross-Team Alignment Summary](../../_canonical/cross-team-alignment-summary.md) | Outlook | Identify alignment gaps and consensus between teams | intermediate |
| [Daily Command Centre](../../_canonical/daily-command-centre.md) | Cross-App | Start each working day with a single synthesised briefing across email, calendar, and outstanding commitments — replacing a 20-minute inbox scan with a 3-minute structured read. | intermediate |
| [Deadline + Task Extractor](../../_canonical/deadline-plus-task-extractor.md) | Outlook | Convert email threads into structured task lists with deadlines and dependencies | intermediate |
| [Decision Clarifier](../../_canonical/decision-clarifier.md) | Outlook | Extract pending decisions and decision-makers from email threads | beginner |
| [Decision Triage](../../_canonical/decision-triage.md) | Cross-App | Surface all pending decisions sitting in email and Teams and classify each one by who should own it — reducing decision bottlenecks and freeing the manager to focus on what only they can decide. | intermediate |
| [Draft a Polished Escalation Email](../../_canonical/draft-a-polished-escalation-email.md) | Outlook | Escalate issues professionally to senior leadership | intermediate |
| [Email Triage and Delegation Filter](../../_canonical/email-triage-and-delegation-filter.md) | Outlook | Rapidly classify today's inbox into respond-myself, delegate, monitor, or archive — cutting inbox processing time and reducing decision fatigue. | intermediate |
| [End-of-Week Manager Reset](../../_canonical/end-of-week-manager-reset.md) | Cross-App | A structured weekly closure routine — capturing wins, open loops, and priorities to carry forward — so the manager doesn't mentally carry work into the weekend. | intermediate |
| [Escalation Decision Support](../../_canonical/escalation-decision-support.md) | Cross-App | Before escalating an issue to senior leadership, gather full context, assess options, and structure the escalation communication — so you arrive prepared and with a clear ask. | intermediate |
| [Extract Agenda Items](../../_canonical/extract-agenda-items.md) | Outlook | Build meeting agendas from email discussions | beginner |
| [Feedback Drafting Assistant](../../_canonical/feedback-drafting-assistant.md) | Cross-App | Draft specific, evidence-based, developmental or recognitive feedback for a team member using a structured SBI framework — so the conversation is grounded and constructive. | intermediate |
| [Focus Time Protector](../../_canonical/focus-time-protector.md) | Cross-App | Analyse the current week's calendar for deep-work gaps and generate specific focus-block recommendations before the week fills completely with meetings. | advanced |
| [Issue to Solution Matrix](../../_canonical/issue-to-solution-matrix.md) | Outlook | Organize problems and solutions in a structured matrix | intermediate |
| [Manager's Weekly Decision Log](../../_canonical/managers-weekly-decision-log.md) | Cross-App | Create a running record of decisions made during the week to reduce repeated re-litigating and build institutional memory — for personal use, not HR records. | intermediate |
| [Meeting Audit and Calendar Declutter](../../_canonical/meeting-audit-and-calendar-declutter.md) | Cross-App | Identify which recurring and one-off meetings to skip, delegate, shorten, or cancel — recovering focus time without dropping important commitments. | advanced |
| [Multi-Thread Consolidation](../../_canonical/multi-thread-consolidation.md) | Outlook | Consolidate scattered email threads into a single coherent summary | advanced |
| [New Team Member Onboarding Orchestrator](../../_canonical/new-team-member-onboarding-orchestrator.md) | Cross-App | Generate a manager-side onboarding plan and communications for a new direct report joining the team — so the first 30 days are intentional, not improvised. | advanced |
| [OKR and Goal Alignment Check](../../_canonical/okr-and-goal-alignment-check.md) | Cross-App | Map where your actual time and team communications are going against stated quarterly goals — surfacing misalignment between stated priorities and real effort allocation. | advanced |
| [One-to-One Meeting Prep Assistant](../../_canonical/one-to-one-meeting-prep-assistant.md) | Cross-App | Auto-generate a structured 1:1 agenda for any direct report, synthesising carry-forward items, open commitments, and recent signals — so no important topic is forgotten. | intermediate |
| [Performance Review Evidence Synthesiser](../../_canonical/performance-review-evidence-synthesiser.md) | Cross-App | Aggregate work evidence from communications to support a fair, fact-based performance review conversation — reducing recency bias and memory gaps. | advanced |
